narratives.evidence_quote: "A disturbing new report has emerged revealing that an overwhelming number of so-called “American elites” support the tyrannical “climate” policies of the World Economic Forum (WEF)."
narratives.reasoning: The text explicitly frames climate policies as tyrannical and presents support for rationing as part of those policies, indicating a critical stance toward climate policies.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of climate policies: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: A disturbing new report has emerged revealing that an overwhelming number of so-called “American elites” support the tyrannical “climate” policies of the World Economic Forum (WEF).
subnarratives.reasoning: The text explicitly describes climate policies as tyrannical and frames elite support for them as endorsement of oppressive climate measures, aligning with the parent narrative of criticizing climate policies. There is no explicit claim of policy ineffectiveness, economic harm, or profit motive in the excerpt.
